channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South Africa and the Continent Must Address Migration as a Governance Challenge
item.description: The article emphasizes that migration is a complex, multifaceted issue deeply intertwined with South Africa's and Africa's economic, social, and political landscapes. It highlights that migration cann...

item.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene Criticizes Pete Hegseth's Remarks Following the Death of Two U.S. Service Members in Iranian Strike
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene sharply criticized Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth after he referred to two U.S. service members killed in an Iranian strike in Jordan as having made a 'sacrifice.' The disp...

item.title: Quezon City Government Provides Support to Slain Rider’s Family
item.description: The Quezon City government has stepped in to assist the family of Fabio Norberte Jr., a motorcycle taxi rider who was stabbed to death by his passenger on July 14, 2026, in Caloocan. Officials express...

item.title: Blood test could predict Alzheimer’s risk years before symptoms, study suggests
item.description: A groundbreaking blood test that detects a protein linked to Alzheimer’s could identify the disease up to a decade before symptoms appear, according to a study presented at the Alzheimer’s Association...

item.title: Spain and Argentina Reach World Cup Final After Dramatic Journeys
item.description: The article details Spain's and Argentina's paths to the 2022 FIFA World Cup final. Spain, led by manager Luis de la Fuente, secured a crucial 2-1 victory over France in the semifinal after a tense ma...

item.title: US and Iran escalate conflict over troop deaths and regional tensions
item.description: The US launched airstrikes against Iran following the killing of American troops, escalating tensions in the region. Iran responded by firing missiles toward Jordan, raising fears of conflict spilling...

item.title: Winnipeg man charged with extortion after keeping missing cat
item.description: A 44-year-old woman in Winnipeg reported her cat missing from her home on July 14, 2026. Police investigations revealed a neighbor suspected of involvement, who later admitted to possessing the cat an...

item.title: Pedestrian Fatally Struck by Vehicle in Mississauga, Ontario
item.description: A 20-year-old woman was tragically killed after being struck by a vehicle in Mississauga, Ontario, according to a report by CTV News. The incident, which occurred on July 18, 2026, has prompted local ...

item.title: Trump attends World Cup final as U.S. president watches Argentina and Spain clash
item.description: President Donald Trump attended the FIFA World Cup final on Sunday, where he watched Argentina face Spain for the championship trophy. Departing from Bedminster, New Jersey, Trump arrived at MetLife S...

item.title: Strangers Save 7-Year-Old Wyoming Girl's Birthday Party After All Invitations Were Canceled

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru extend restaurant hours for late-night viewing
item.description: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 final approaches between Argentina and Spain, Indian cities like Delhi, Mumbai, and Bengaluru have extended restaurant hours to accommodate late-night viewing. Delhi's Chief...

item.title: Mantrac and NMB Facilitate Equipment Financing for Miners and Contractors
item.description: On July 19, 2026, Mantrac and the National Mining Board (NMB) announced a significant initiative to provide equipment financing solutions for miners and contractors operating in Tanzania. This move ai...

item.title: Kiwi golfer Ryan Fox claims historic British Open victory after 63-year drought
item.description: Australian Lucas Herbert came agonisingly close to securing his first major championship title at the British Open, but New Zealand's Ryan Fox stole the show with a clutch birdie on the final hole to ...

item.title: Wildfire in Southern France Forces Evacuations of Hamlets
item.description: A wildfire swept through towns on France's Mediterranean coast near Frejus, threatening homes and forcing the evacuation of several hamlets. Strong winds and drought conditions fueled the rapid spread...

item.title: Federal Government launches digital initiative to regulate mining sector
item.description: The Federal Government has announced a major initiative to digitize Nigeria's mining sector to enhance transparency, track illegal activities, and ensure compliance with regulations. The plan involves...

item.title: LTFRB regulates ride-hailing fares to cap surcharges
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has reinstated a fixed pick-up fare system for ride-hailing services to address rising operational costs and ensure fair pricing. Under...

item.title: JD Vance's Comments on Epstein and Israeli Intelligence Ties Spark Controversy
item.description: Vice President JD Vance has sparked controversy by endorsing conspiracy theories linking convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein to 'highest levels' of Israeli intelligence during an interview with pod...

item.title: Canada and U.S. Finalize Revenue Sharing Agreement for Gordie Howe Bridge
item.description: U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick has publicly endorsed the revenue-sharing agreement for the Gordie Howe International Bridge, stating the U.S. will receive 50% of net revenues until 2041. The d...
